name: Apple Business Manager
description: Verify device enrollment, MDM assignment, and profile status in Apple Business Manager (DEP)

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log into Apple Business (business.apple.com) as an Administrator
2. Go to Settings > MDM Server > your MDM server name
3. Click 'Download Token' to get the server token file (.p7m)
4. Decrypt the S/MIME token using your MDM server's private key
5. The decrypted JSON contains: consumer_key, consumer_secret, access_token, access_secret
6. Enter those 4 values below

Note: Your MDM server must be registered in Apple Business before you can download a token.

credentialFields.label: Consumer Key
credentialFields.helpText: The consumer_key from your decrypted DEP server token

credentialFields.label: Consumer Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The consumer_secret from your decrypted DEP server token

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: The access_token from your decrypted DEP server token

credentialFields.label: Access Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The access_secret from your decrypted DEP server token

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to Apple Business Manager DEP API by establishing an OAuth 1.0a session

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks that devices are registered in Apple Business Manager and assigned to an MDM server with enrollment profiles

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Maintains an inventory of all devices registered in Apple Business Manager with their details
